title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 89.210 - Street defined
text:
89.210.  Street defined. — The word "street", as used in sections 89.220 to 89.250, means any public highway, esplanade, boulevard, parkway, square or street, or any part or side, or part of the side, of any of the same.
(RSMo 1939 § 7747) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 7599
